entry.title: Re: Is it really impossible to assign the same sales group to multiple sales offices in SAP CBC?
entry.content: Removed "SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" tag as it should only be used if no other specific sub-tag is available. In this case "SAP Central Business Configuration" is relevant.

entry.title: Re: order request automatization
entry.content:
Hello Katy-159 ,

Let me try to explain you in simple manner.

When you check prod order process flow, Step (1) actually belongs prod order release part and not the Order Request. Because Order Request means 1 as given in image.

So as per SAP Standards, with configuration we can automate release function of prod order.

This can be achieved in following manner:

For Discrete Manufacturing: Go to Tcode OPKP - Prod Scheduling Profile and Simply tick indicator Release in On Creation Section, this way you can release your production order during creation step itself. Thats called as Automation Step just to avoid 2 step process.

For Process Industry: Go to Tcode CORY - Prod Scheduling Profile - you can perform same steps as explained above for automatic release of process orders.

If this explanation is satisfactory for you then you can mark this answer and close this thread.

entry.title: SAP FSM QUEry
entry.content:
Hello,

I wanna convert a text into a number using queries in FSM.

I have a checklist with a dropdown to select the level of fuel : 1/4, 2/4, 3/4 and 4/4

The goal is to have a query that can do some calculation :

Select carburant.value from ChecklistInstanceElement ....

Is ther a function that can convert the text value into a number so i could for example calculate the value *100

 

Thanks

entry.title: SAP Enable Now Learner Third party access
entry.content:
Hi, I have seen lots of posts on licensing and I know there was a way to grant access to third party customers via a guest role (so no SSO required) but believe this is no longer available.

Is there any way for me to grant access to third party customers just to view tutorials or books/book pages without SSO? Or would this require procurement of further licenses?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: New Info Structure for MC.9 Report
entry.content:
Hello @Pradeep93 

Indeed the note 38891 is not useful for your case at all.

The general procedure to define INVCO info structures is described in the note 483735 - Self-defined info structures with reference S031, S032, S039 However you need to have some LIS knowledge to implement such info structures.

Bare in mind that MC.9 can't be used with custom INVCO info structures. They have to be used with MCSK instead. If you go with custom info structures, you are going to lose all the additional features of MC.9 as compared to MCSK.

On top of that notice that INVCO is unfortunately obsolete in S/4HANA - notes:

  • 2659269 - Inventory controlling reports are not working in S4 HANA system
  • 3126267 - What are successor Fiori apps for Inventory Controlling (Application 03) report like MC.9 in S/4HANA system?

That is due to the fact that the new late locking strategy in S/4HANA is incompatible with INVCO. That is even referred to as a S/4HANA limitation in the latter note:

Due to limitation in S/4HANA system you cannot have late lock setting being turned on while still allow LIS update

Basically S/4HANA has traded functionality for speed.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Learning Hub Subscription Purchasing Error (VAL_0101)
entry.content:
Hi @Somdeb

If you want to purchase the SAP Learning Hub Standard edition license as an individual 
please note that as an individual purchaser (B2I), you can only make purchases by accepting SAP B2B Terms & Conditions.
As an individual purchaser, you should book the license under an organization (using your name as the company name and your home address as the postal address). For VAT purposes, you can use a dummy VAT registration number in your country's specific format.
Please follow the link provided here and fill out the information as mentioned above to proceed with placing the order.

Kind regards
Margit

Please feel free to reach out if you need any further assistance.

entry.title: RSP backup not generate on network drive, even it is configured to do
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to generate RSP backup outside of DB server, i.e. on network drive.

I saved configuration but still backup generate on local path.

entry.title: Integrating SAP Fieldglass to Employee Central: Configuration Setup and User Provisioning (Part 2)
entry.content:
In continuing with the previous blog on implementing Total Workforce Management where we discussed the key identifiers in each of the involved systems (SAP Fieldglass, SAP SuccessFactors and SAP S/4 HANA HCM), let us now examine the key prerequisites to be enabled in SAP SuccessFactors solution followed by user provisioning and a comparison of standard vs. customer integration.

SAP SuccessFactors Configuration

1. SAP SuccessFactors mandatory attributes not captured in SAP Fieldglass are changed to “optional” in the base data model. SAP SuccessFactors API imports use the base data model to determine mandatory fields.

2. PositionID is set as “optional” in the base data model as it is not a mandatory attribute for SAP Fieldglass workers like Services Procurement or Profile workers

3. “Concurrent Employment for Contingent Worker” in SAP SuccessFactors is enabled or the customer does not have the requirement to have an SAP Fieldglass worker on multiple active work orders.

4. The standard mapping of SAP Fieldglass Identifiers is handled which is - SAP Fieldglass Work Order ID -> User ID and SAP Fieldglass Security ID or Master Worker ID - > Person ID External) in integrations downstream from SuccessFactors.

5. Job Information to Position Sync is enabled.

User Provisioning

SAP's recommended approach is to use Identity Services (IAS/IPS)-based integration for user provisioning. It’s an easy, centrally administered user management and identity provisioning system. Customers will benefit from the central user management thus maintaining users in multiple systems across a heterogeneous landscape will be obsolete. I invite you to look at the IDP (Section 6.2.1 on page 19) for a detailed approach on carrying out user provisioning.

Standard Integration vs. Custom Integration

The standard integration supports general use cases but does not offer any flexibility for custom mapping or specific scenario management with customers. Hence, a solution to this is to have a custom integration instead which is to copy the SAP Standard Package to a custom-specific one. It is important to understand various business scenarios and use cases that a company may come across, to ensure their varied needs are covered with a custom integration for holistic solution coverage. Hence, there is a prior need to identity these use cases.

Section 5.5 and Section 6.5 of the IDP provides detailed guidance on how one has the option to create logical checks on the data input from Fieldglass and create unique routes of updating data, adding custom fields and logic on what entities should be updated to ensure correct and stable data uploads. 

Do let us know some of the tips and tricks you have used in your implementation of SAP Fieldglass integration to Employee Central. It will be great to hear from you!

Additional resources:

Blog - Part 1

Implementation Design Principle

Implementation Guide for SAP Fieldglass Integration with SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

Integrating Employee Central with SAP Fieldglass

Integrating SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central with SAP Master Data Integration

Replicating Master Data Using SAP Master Data Integration Service

Administration Fundamentals

Master Data Integration

entry.title: SAP ATTP overview, Architecture and features
entry.content:
SAP ATTP – Overview, Features and Architecture

SAP Advanced Track and Trace for Pharmaceuticals (ATTP) is a specialized solution designed for pharmaceutical companies to effectively manage serial numbers, minimize compliance costs, and strengthen supply chain integrity. Its robust features ensure comprehensive visibility and traceability of pharmaceuticals, fully compliant with global serialization regulations.

SAP ATTP Overview

  • Ensuring Visibility and Traceability: SAP ATTP's primary objective is to ensure seamless visibility and traceability of pharmaceuticals by meticulously adhering to stringent global regulations on serialization, tracking, tracing, and reporting. This commitment fosters transparency, accountability, and trustworthiness throughout the entire supply chain ecosystem, ultimately enhancing the integrity and reliability of pharmaceutical products.
  • Overseeing Complex Supply Chains: ATTP plays a pivotal role in managing intricate supply chains, ensuring product genuineness, and mitigating risks associated with counterfeit activities or illicit diversions. This enhances brand reputation, bolsters consumer trust, and ensures stringent regulatory compliance.
  • Centralizing data and analytics: By centralizing product data serialization, tracking, and incorporating comprehensive reporting and analytics capabilities, SAP ATTP empowers organizations to make informed, data-driven decisions, enabling continuous improvement and operational excellence in pharmaceutical supply chain management.
  • Strengthening Pharmaceutical Supply Chains: Through fostering transparency, accountability, and operational excellence, SAP ATTP strengthens pharmaceutical supply chains, ensuring compliance with regulatory requirements, reducing counterfeiting risks, and building enduring consumer trust in the authenticity and safety of pharmaceutical products.
  • Risk Mitigation: SAP ATTP employs advanced algorithms and data analytics to detect and mitigate risks associated with counterfeit products and unauthorized diversions within the supply chain. By implementing secure serialization processes and authentication mechanisms, it helps pharmaceutical companies protect their brands and maintain consumer trust in product authenticity.
  • Equipped with robust features and functionalities, SAP ATTP serves as a vital tool for pharmaceutical companies to streamline serialization processes, mitigate compliance risks, and enhance supply chain security, ultimately contributing to the advancement of public health and safety.

SAP ATTP Features

  • Serialization Management: Serialization management involves the systematic assignment and tracking of unique identifiers (e.g., serial numbers) to individual units of pharmaceutical products. It ensures compliance with global regulatory mandates by enabling precise identification and traceability throughout the supply chain.
  • Aggregation and Disaggregation: Aggregation refers to grouping serialized units into larger entities (e.g., bundles, cases) for streamlined handling and distribution. Disaggregation involves breaking down these larger entities into individual serialized units. These processes optimize inventory management and logistics while maintaining traceability and compliance with serialization requirements.
  • Regulatory Compliance: Regulatory compliance in pharmaceutical supply chains entails adhering to stringent serialization, tracking, and reporting regulations enforced by agencies such as FDA and EMA. SAP ATTP facilitates compliance by providing robust tools for data capture, audit trails, and regulatory reporting, ensuring adherence to mandated standards.
  • Product Traceability: Product traceability involves tracking the complete lifecycle of pharmaceutical products, from manufacturing to distribution and beyond. SAP ATTP enhances traceability by capturing and managing serialized data at every stage, enabling rapid identification and resolution of quality issues and facilitating efficient recall management.
  • Reporting: SAP ATTP offers advanced reporting capabilities for generating comprehensive insights into serialized product data, compliance status, and supply chain performance metrics. These reports support informed decision-making and regulatory submissions by providing actionable analytics on operational efficiencies and compliance metrics.
  • Integration: Integration capabilities within SAP ATTP enable seamless connectivity with ERP, MES, and logistics systems, ensuring real-time data synchronization and visibility across the supply chain. This integration facilitates efficient management of serialized product data and enhances collaboration among stakeholders in compliance and operational workflows.

Architecture of SAP – ATTP

The architecture is designed to integrate seamlessly into pharmaceutical manufacturing and distribution environments, providing end-to-end visibility and control over product serialization, traceability, and compliance. Each layer plays a critical role in ensuring data integrity, regulatory compliance, operational efficiency, and secure data management throughout the product lifecycle.

  • Database Layer: Responsible for managing structured data storage, including serialization data (unique identifiers for products), transactional information (events related to product movements), and detailed product specifications. It ensures robust scalability to handle large volumes of data and maintains data integrity through transactional consistency and relational database management.
  • Application Layer: This layer hosts the core business logic and application services of SAP ATTP. It executes complex algorithms for transaction processing, manages serialization processes (assigning, capturing, and verifying unique identifiers), handles aggregation (combining serialized units into larger containers), and enforces compliance with regulatory standards (such as track-and-trace requirements).
  • Integration Layer: Facilitates interoperability between SAP ATTP and other enterprise systems such as ERP (Enterprise Resource Planning), WMS (Warehouse Management Systems), and external stakeholders' systems (regulatory authorities, trading partners). It supports various communication protocols (like web services, messaging queues) to ensure seamless data exchange, synchronization of serialization data, and real-time visibility across the supply chain network.
  • User Interface (UI) Layer: Provides multiple interfaces (web-based, desktop, and mobile) for users to interact with SAP ATTP. It offers functionalities for managing serialization activities (such as querying and updating product traceability data), monitoring compliance status, handling exceptions (like product recalls), and generating reports on serialization performance and regulatory adherence.
  • Security Layer: Implements robust security measures to safeguard sensitive serialization data and ensure regulatory compliance. This includes access control mechanisms (defining user roles and permissions), encryption of sensitive data during transmission and storage, authentication (verifying user identities), and authorization (granting access based on roles and permissions).
  • Analytics & Reporting Layer: Utilizes data analytics tools and reporting functionalities to generate actionable insights from serialization data. It provides predefined and customizable reports on supply chain performance, compliance metrics (like adherence to serialization regulations), and trends analysis. These insights help stakeholders make informed decisions, improve operational efficiencies, and ensure continuous compliance with regulatory requirements.

MAH View for SAP ATTP Architecture

The MAH (Marketing Authorization Holder) view in SAP ATTP serves as a specialized perspective within the system, focusing on enabling marketing authorization holders to manage serialization processes efficiently, ensure regulatory compliance, and gain actionable insights into supply chain operations.

MAH View encompasses several key functionalities and perspectives tailored to the needs of the marketing authorization holders in the pharmaceutical industry:

  • Authorization and Access: Customizes permissions and access levels specific to the roles of marketing authorization holders, ensuring appropriate visibility and control over serialization and traceability activities within the system.
  • Serialization Configuration: Empowers MAHs to configure serialization parameters such as serial number formats, aggregation rules, and other settings crucial for compliance with global regulatory standards. This capability enables MAHs to adapt to varying regulatory requirements across different markets efficiently.
  • Compliance Management: Supports MAHs in maintaining compliance with global serialization regulations through robust tools for serialization, traceability, and compliance reporting. This includes functionalities for capturing and managing serialization data, verifying product authenticity, and responding to regulatory queries or audits effectively.
  • Reporting and Analytics: Provides comprehensive reporting and analytics functionalities tailored to MAHs’ needs. This includes tracking serialization activities in real-time, generating compliance reports (such as serialization status reports and audit trails), and analysing supply chain performance to identify opportunities for optimization and regulatory adherence.

entry.title: Customer to Supplier Expansion LTMC/DATA MIGRATION
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to expand a customer already created with the PN role FCLU00 and FCLU01 (customer) and I want to expand to the role FLVN00 and FLVN01 (supplier) and I can't find any object in LTMC/Data Migration that allows me to expand, it only exists for creation or expansion to another sales organisation within the customer itself.

Has anyone ever tried to expand via LTMC/Data Migration? If so, which object should be used to move from customer to supplier?

Best regards,

Joana Ferreira

entry.title: New Sandbox Available on the SAP Learning Site to Practice Hands-on
entry.content:
We are excited to announce the availability of new sandbox systems for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition and SAP Business Application Studio – Sandbox on the SAP Learning site, available for SAP Learning Hub subscribers.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition - Sandbox

 SAP Business Application Studio – Sandbox

This sandbox is a practice system to explore, test, experiment, build use cases and get a first look and feel of SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. Suitable for all roles and levels, it is filled with sample data that you can use to explore the functionality, experiment with scenarios, and test your results.

Learners can get a first look and feel, explore how to navigate SAP S/4HANA Cloud or the SAP Business Application Studio. Experienced users can use it to try out an experiment or build their use cases for projects.

The sandbox is available for approximately a month, after that it is refreshed and reset to its initial state. After the refresh, all created data will be deleted, and you can start practicing fresh.

You can access the sandboxes with an SAP Learning Hub subscription, under the following pages:

  • Practice for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition – Sandbox
  • SAP Business Application Studio – Sandbox
    These Videos here will help you getting started on BTP Application Studio:

Side-by-Side Extensions on SAP BTP | SAP Learning

 

We believe that hands-on practice is one of the most effective ways to deepen technical skills and confidence in any solution. With this new feature, you can directly practice your skills in a risk-free environment.

To get started, please go to the SAP Learning site and launch your sandboxes. Make sure you have a valid SAP Learning Hub subscription to start experimenting. Happy learning!

Regards

Moulika

entry.title: can I connect SAP Datasphere to Priority Software?
entry.content:
Hey, 
Can Priority Software (ERP) can be connected directly to SAP Datasphere?
Thank you

entry.title: Is it possible to "consume" metadata extensions in SAPUI5
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I learn ABAP RAP and have defined a metadata extension in my service.

 

@Metadata.layer: #CORE
@UI.headerInfo: {
  typeName: 'Handling Unit',
  title: { value: 'HandlingUnitNumber', type: #STANDARD },
  description: { value: 'HandlingUnitUsageDescription' }
}
annotate entity /#####/#####
  with 
{
  .facet: [{
    id: 'HeaderFacet',
    purpose: #HEADER,
    type: #FIELDGROUP_REFERENCE,
    targetQualifier: 'HeaderItems'
  }]
  
  .fieldGroup: [{
    qualifier: 'HeaderItems',
    position: 10
  }]
  PackagingMaterialName;
   
}

 

Is it possible to use/call/consume this metadata extension inside a SAPUI5 app as an addition? I read something about extensions points, but they didn't help me much 😕

 

Any approach or hint is appreciated. 

 

Kind regards

Jürgen

entry.title: Re: Get to Know RAP: Enhance Behavior With Action and Validation
entry.content:
Do you have an example for deleting an entity?

My app opens the object page after deleting of ONE entity (if I delete >1 it works).

I need to use a action (use defined label for the action, delete in one table, in seconds table I make an update).

entry.title: Line Monitor: Order Progress Goods Receipt Quantity does not work
entry.content:
Hello DM Experts,

the order progress (production details) in the Line Monitor POD is not updated when a partial quantity confirmation or, in this case, a yield confirmation is posted in the Work Center POD.

The order progress only updates when an order is completed.

Thank you in advance for any advice!

Best regards
Gizem

entry.title: Historical reporting on sales order incompletion log
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Do you know of a way to report on those sales orders that have had an incompletion log?

My problem is that, once resolved, the orders will logically not show anymore in transactions like V.02 but I then also lost the possibility to be able to report on such errors and drive corrective actions. I'm considering to setup an automatic output of the v.02 report at intervals which then needs to get consolidated (more an Excel task) for each dy of the month to get a lookback possibillity. But I wonder if there's a better way? 

Many thanks

Mike

entry.title: Purchasing Info Record and Conditions joining condition in CDS on S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content:
In S/4 Hana Cloud, I have created a purchasing info record document and created 2 conditions with different prices. Now I want to create a list report based on that. However, I cannot find the joining condition between these two. 

I have used I_PURCHASINGINFORECORDAPI01 and I_PURGPRCGCONDITIONRECORD for creating the report but didn't find a suitable condition for joining. 

Can anyone assist me in getting the joining condition?

entry.title: Re: Quality inspection result recording failing in SAP Digital Manufacturing.
entry.content: Greetings! Are you perhaps using inspection points?

entry.title: Re: Quality inspection result recording failing in SAP Di...
entry.content: Yes. I'm using inspection points. I have configured 2 inspection points on 2 separate materials. Both configurations are similar to each other but for one it's not asking for any additional "missing user fields".

entry.title: Re: Quality inspection result recording failing in SAP Di...
entry.content: Can you confirm that inspection point identifiers are exactly the same in ERP and DMC system?

entry.title: Re: Be Comfortable, Authentic and Interview the Interviewer 🧑🏻‍💻
entry.content: Great insight! Kudos on sharing 👏

entry.title: Re: how can i set the OModelData binding with radiobutton
entry.content: Another option would have been to bind against the selected property of the RadioButton for true and to use the type sap.ui.model.odata.type.Boolean for the binding in the table.

Diogo

entry.title: Re: Migration Business Partner with multiple roles
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm trying to expand a customer already created with the PN role FCLU00 and FCLU01 (customer) and I want to expand to the role FLVN00 and FLVN01 (vendor) and I can't find any object in LTMC/Data Migration that allows me to expand, it only exists for creation or expansion to another sales organisation within the customer itself.

Based on this reply, I have tried to find the objects mentioned here and I can't find them.

I can only find these object: - customer - extend existing record by credit management data; extend existing recording by multiple addresses; extend existing record by new org levels.

Best regards,

Joana Ferreira

entry.title: Re: Quality inspection result recording failing in SAP Di...
entry.content: Yes. I cross checked once again. All identifiers are same in DM and ERP

entry.title: Re: Extension Ledger Type not showing for Extension Ledger in FINSC_LEDGER
entry.content:
How did you solve the issue?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Select from dynamic data source
entry.content:
Dears,

I recently made some progress and wanted to share it with you. The get_data method update makes the select statement more dynamic and complex, as shown below:

There's also an interesting point in AMDP: if you want to use single quotes inside a string, you need to use double quotes, similar to ABAP syntax.

 

  METHOD get_data BY DATABASE FUNCTION FOR HDB LANGUAGE SQLSCRIPT OPTIONS READ-ONLY
  USING
  tadir
  .
    declare lv_fm_tab string;
    declare tablename string;
    declare clientnumber string;
    declare systemid string;
    declare deriv string;
    declare select_state string;
*    must be the same data types as consuming cds also in same order
    declare it_fm_tab table (
      mandt nvarchar(3),
      sour1_from nvarchar(24),
      sour1_to nvarchar(24),
      valid_from nvarchar(10),
      target1 nvarchar(16),
      delete_flg nvarchar(1),
      added_by nvarchar(12),
      added_on nvarchar(10),
      sour2_from nvarchar(12),
      sour2_to   nvarchar(12)
      );

*    fields from parameters
    clientnumber = clnt5;
    SELECT srcsystem INTO systemid FROM tadir WHERE pgmid = 'HEAD' AND object = 'SYST';


      IF derivation = 'COST' then
        IF systemid = 'DS1' then deriv = '0051'; END if;
        IF systemid = 'QS1' then deriv = '0062'; END if;
        IF systemid = 'PS1' then deriv = '0051'; END if;

      select_state = 'select MANDT, SOUR1_FROM, SOUR1_TO, VALID_FROM, TARGET1, DELETE_FLG, ADDED_BY, ADDED_ON, '' '' as SOUR2_FROM, '' '' as SOUR2_TO from ';

      END if;
      IF derivation = 'NETW' then
        IF systemid = 'DS1' then deriv = '0022'; END if;
        IF systemid = 'QS1' then deriv = '0063'; END if;
        IF systemid = 'PS1' then deriv = '0051'; END if;

        select_state = 'select MANDT, SOUR1_FROM, SOUR1_TO, VALID_FROM, TARGET1, DELETE_FLG, ADDED_BY, ADDED_ON, SOUR2_FROM, SOUR2_TO from ';
        
      END if;

    tablename = 'FMFMOA' || systemid || clientnumber || deriv;
    EXECUTE immediate select_state || tablename into it_fm_tab ;
    RETURN SELECT * FROM :it_fm_tab;

  ENDMETHOD.


Regards,

Abdelrahman Zaki

entry.title: Re: How may I set Extension Ledger as Predictive Ledger?
entry.content: Hello, Could you solve the issue? Currently I am having the same problem. Thank you

entry.title: [Business Accelerator Hub] How to create BOM with BOM Item Object Dependency Assignment via Odata?
entry.content:
I am able to create BOM with Header and Item, then add the BOM Item Object Dependency Assignment into Created BOM. However, I want to create BOM with BOM Item Object Dependency Assignment via Odata in only 1 Call. Is it possible?

I am using this API below and I see the to_BOMItmObjDependencyAssignment  inside the to_BillOfMaterialItem but can't create Object Dependency in the same time even though it returns 201 and the BOM Header - Item is created, not Object Dependency.
SAP Business Accelerator Hub

This is the request body for POST menthod

{
    "BillOfMaterial": "",
    "BillOfMaterialCategory": "M",
    "BillOfMaterialVariant": "1",
    "BillOfMaterialVersion": "",
    "EngineeringChangeDocument": "",
    "Material": "999",
    "Plant": "1234",
    "BillOfMaterialVariantUsage": "3",
    "BillOfMaterialAuthsnGrp": "7000",
    "IsConfiguredMaterial": true,
    "BOMHeaderText": "API Test Create",
    "BillOfMaterialStatus": "10",
    "to_BillOfMaterialItem": [
        {
            "BillOfMaterial": "",
            "BillOfMaterialCategory": "T",
            "BillOfMaterialVariant": "1",
            "BillOfMaterialVersion": "",
            "BillOfMaterialItemNodeNumber": "1",
            "HeaderChangeDocument": "",
            "Material": "999",
            "Plant": "1234",
            "BillOfMaterialComponent": "",
            "BillOfMaterialItemCategory": "T",
            "BillOfMaterialItemNumber": "0010",
            "BillOfMaterialItemUnit": "PC",
            "BillOfMaterialItemQuantity": "10",
            "BOMItemDescription": "TESTING BOM CREATE 999",
            "DependencyObjectNumber": "0",
            "ObjectType": "2",
            "to_BOMItmObjDependencyAssignment": [
                {
                    "BillOfMaterial": "",
                    "BillOfMaterialCategory": "M",
                    "BillOfMaterialVariant": "1",
                    "BillOfMaterialVersion": "",
                    "BillOfMaterialItemNodeNumber": "1",
                    "HeaderChangeDocument": "",
                    "Material": "999",
                    "Plant": "1234",
                    "ObjectDependencyName": "TEST_OBJ_DEPEN",
                    "ObjDpnProcessingSequenceValue": "0"
                }
            ]
        }
    ]
}

entry.title: Re: Task 4 - Plain "REST" endpoint (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content: My submission for Task 4, PASS

entry.title: Expiry Access for the System
entry.content:
Dears, 

I have an issue with one of our customers, that the client has delays in renewing the subscription for the success factor licenses. 

so in the SAP for Me, portal using the SUser for the client, the Cloud licneses are getting disappeared, however the customer still has access on the SF portals. 

 

My question, what is the extended time for the client to continue accessing the systems without renewed the licenses till getting blocked. 

@SuccessFactors 

Thanks,

Islam

entry.title: Re: Line Monitor: Order Progress Goods Receipt Quantity d...
entry.content:
Hi, 

Line Monitor Order Progress plugin is all about Goods Receipt posting, which normally happens when the last operation in the routing is completed and the SFC is done. See: Line Monitor Order Progress.

Operation confirmation progress, based on yield and scrap posting, can be seen in Quality tab of Line Monitor using Line Monitor Yield And Scrap plugin. See: Line Monitor Yield And Scrap.

Hope it helps,

Manoel

entry.title: Re: Recap of SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024- Business AI Edition
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing this summary @Prasath 
I am glad I could have been able to share at least virtually my sense about SAP Community. I also saw other presentations like that from Philipp Herzig virtually! Great that organizer provided this opportunity!

entry.title: Re: Quality inspection result recording failing in SAP Di...
entry.content:
Are you running the Production Order in Order POD?
"Inspection points are only supported in Order POD", see: Using Inspection Points.

Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: Quality inspection result recording failing in SAP Di...
entry.content: There is a similar question here -> https://community.sap.com/t5/product-lifecycle-management-q-a/issue-while-downloading-process-order-in-sap-dmc/qaq-p/12803838

entry.title: Unlocking the hidden value in your business processes with our new ‘Value Cookbook’
entry.content:
Accelerate your value journey with our new 'Value Cookbook'

In the tumultuous sea of today's global economy, organizations are more focused than ever on tapping into their financial potential. The lifesaver? A value-centric approach embedded into every aspect of their operations.

To demonstrate the hidden value that SAP Signavio customers can uncover in their business processes, we recently ran ‘The Value Challenge’ initiative. We worked with customers across four geographical regions to show them what’s possible by using SAP Signavio Process Insights and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence together. The results were impressive: we identified over $2 billion of potential value across the 75 participating organizations.

Want to unlock your hidden business potential, optimize working capital and, drive revenue growth? We have just the thing for you: our new ‘Value Cookbook’.

Spoiler
Let's cook up some serious value for your organization, download our 'Value Cookbook' now!

It compiles the best practice approaches for the most common customer use cases and explores ways to identify your value concealed within the Lead-to-Cash and Source-to-Pay processes. The guide includes click-through demos to navigate the usage of SAP Signavio Process Insights and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence effectively for process enhancement. 

Keep reading this article to find out how: 

  • SAP Signavio Process Insights and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence can empower you to unlock the hidden value in your business processes. 
  • Our SAP Signavio ‘value cookbook’ benefits you and your organization. 
  • A constantly upheld value-centric approach aids in creating tangible value for you, your customers, and stakeholders.

Unlocking Business Processes’ Value

SAP Signavio Process Insights generates analytics reports on your business processes, showing you exactly how fast and efficient they are. It pulls data from your SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA or SAP ARIBA to give you a clear picture of what's really happening. SAP Signavio Process Intelligence deepens your analysis. It helps you optimize operations, improve customer service, and catch compliance issues before they become problems.

These solutions come equipped with out-of-the-box value features. When you combine them with our ‘Value Cookbook’, they provide a robust starting point for analysts to tackle common use cases effectively and efficiently. The ‘Value Cookbook’ gives you structured guidance, including click-through demos and best practices to help all types of organizations quickly spot areas for improvement and implement solutions that drive tangible value.

The use of these SAP Signavio analytics solutions benefits your business by:

  • Creating a systematic way to analyze, design, and model business processes.
  • Prioritizing the right opportunities with value accelerators.
  • Providing recommendations for fast value realization, minimizing effort and speeding up time-to-value.
  • Enabling comprehensive monitoring of processes and performance, supporting continuous improvement and long-term business success.

The result? Enhanced efficiency, reduced costs, and superior business outcomes.

How our ‘Value Cookbook’ benefits you and your organization

The ‘Value Cookbook’ is a comprehensive guide designed to navigate the most common use cases across customers for end-to-end processes such as Source-to-Pay and Lead-to-Cash. It provides a 10,000-foot view of each use case, highlighting typical challenges and the root causes behind them. Alongside this, it offers a list of potential SAP solutions to address these issues.

The 'Value Cookbook' also includes a step-by-step guided analysis and value calculation, enabling you to measure the potential value of various improvement opportunities within your organization.

This step-by-step guide bestows an array of benefits:

  • A structured approach helps in efficiently identifying and managing common process challenges
  • Aids in recognizing areas of improvement and provides clear solutions with potential outcomes
  • Enhances operational efficiency and optimizes resource allocation, saving costs and increasing profitability
  • Enables data-driven decision-making, allowing you to prioritize for highest return on investment initiatives

The importance of a Value-Centric Mindset

A value-centric mindset is an organizational approach that places the creation and delivery of value at the core of all business activities. This mindset encompasses principles beyond short-term profits to include long-term customer satisfaction, sustainability, and business growth. By focusing on value creation, you build sleepless sustainability and growth, enhance customer satisfaction, and drive higher profitability.

A value-centric approach offers numerous benefits for organizations. Here are key strategies to implement and sustain this approach:

  • Integrating platforms with continuous improvement efforts to sustain value creation. Use robust analytics and real-time insights to identify inefficiencies and implement best practices, fostering a culture of ongoing improvement.
  • Showcasing potential value and expected ROI to secure stakeholder buy-in
  • Nurturing a value-oriented culture by engaging employees in discussions about value creation
  • Providing clear guidance on starting points to use platforms for unlocking value
  • Improving cash flow, optimizing working capital, and increasing automation for financial health and operational stability
  • Embed a value-centric approach for financial performance and to drive excellence, fostering potential, sustainable growth, and creating lasting value for customers

Unlock Business Potential with SAP Signavio Solutions

In today's challenging economic climate, unlocking hidden value in your business processes is more crucial than ever. SAP Signavio Process Insights and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence, combined with our new ‘Value Cookbook’, provide a powerful approach to optimize your working capital, boost revenue growth, and improve process compliance. By adopting a value-centric mindset and using these solutions, you can uncover numerous opportunities for improvement.

Your journey towards operational excellence and profitability is ongoing. By maintaining a value-centric approach, you'll be well-equipped to navigate challenges, seize opportunities, and achieve sustainable growth.

Three actions to unlock the full potential of your business processes

Ready to transform your business processes and drive significant value? Unlock the full potential of your business processes and drive significant value within your organization with these three actions:

1. Download the ‘Value cookbook’ now

Get your free copy of this comprehensive guide to identify and tackle common process challenges with proven SAP Signavio solutions.

Stay tuned for our upcoming webcast on September 10th, where we'll explore in more detail how to use the ‘Value cookbook’ to unlock the hidden value within your business processes. We'll keep you posted with the details once you download the cookbook.

2. Get inspired by SAP Signavio customers’ successes

Want some inspiration? Check out our latest customer success stories and videos on our customer resources page.

3. Request a demo

To discover other SAP Signavio solutions that can support you in the next phase of your business process transformation, request a demo.

I invite you to take these opportunities to enhance efficiency and improve your business outcomes. Download the ‘Value Cookbook’ today and start your journey to superior business results!

entry.title: Re: AFC Integration with 3rd party ERPs

entry.title: Re: Guided Sourcing - Adoption Best Practice

entry.title: Re: AFC Integration with 3rd party ERPs

Does somebody has an idea or had an experince of how to connect AFC with non-sap system and send request and receive the results from AFC to non-sap erp system?

Last year's event was truly outstanding, and I thoroughly enjoyed every moment. I'm confident this year's event will surpass it and be even more fantastic. Looking forward to it!

Kind Regards


Mark

entry.title: How to downgrade HANA Cloud version after an upgrade.
entry.content:
Hi,

We have our HANA Cloud instance up and running. However, over the period of time, we require to do Patch upgrade and Major Version upgrade also. 
I want to know, what should be our steps in case we want to rollback the HANA DB version to a previous version in case of inconsistency.
Help me with the guide or steps in-case we need to do rollback/rollover of our HANA DB so that we make sure no damage is done to our DB.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to downgrade HANA Cloud version after an upgrade.
entry.content:
Hello, 

This information can be found in:

3363209 - Hana Cloud QRC upgrade - SAP for Me

and 

SAP HANA Database Upgrades and Patches | SAP Help Portal

Best Regards,

SAP Technical Support

entry.title: SD Learning Curve.
entry.content:
Hello,
I'm Sai Kumar from India, and I would like to learn SAP SD as I'm an end user in SAP in my company and would like to upgrade myself and switch my career as a End user to Consultant. So I checked online and offline, and I was not able to learn SD. Can anyone suggest where I can learn SAP SD and how?

entry.title: Re: Named Licenses and Machine Rotation
entry.content:
I think if your first remote machine goes away when the new one is created, then you should be fine with the named user license.  That license would in reality still only be installed on one machine.  You should check the language in your license agreement though.

I don't think the installation can proceed without the license key, so I don't think you can leave that out of the response file.  You would need some process that would customize the response file for each user with the appropriate license key.  This may allow for better management of the licenses so there could be an upside to this.

entry.title: Re: Involved party for report
entry.content: Did anyone find a solution to this? We are also trying to create a report of Opportunities with Party Roles listed as additional columns

entry.title: Re: SD Learning Curve.
entry.content:
Hi @Marker ,

Welcome aboard! Maybe these search results are useful?

Using SAP Service Cloud and Implementing SAP Service Cloud might also help.

Regards,

David

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to "consume" metadata extensions in SA...
entry.content:
what you are trying to get?

normally you don't need to do anything.

entry.title: Sending Customers (t-code BD12) to BTP integration suite (SCPI) fails with MDG error
entry.content:
Hi,

Im trying to send customer data via Integration suite to SAP Commerce. 

I have a recent S/4hana trial version. I managed to send MATMAS(products), COND_A (prices) and now im trying to replicate DEBMAS. However when I try to send the data I receive following error:

The current IDoc is related to a customer. Possible IDoc types are:
DEBMAS for customer data
ADRMAS for customer address data
ADR2MAS or ADR3MAS for the customer's contact person address
DOLMAS for the customer's document links

Your system is configured for using SAP Master Governance for Customers. The related business functions and switches are active. This requires DRF Customizing for the client system BTPSCPI. The same is not configured. The IDoc processing cannot continue and is terminated with a short dump.

I tried to follow up with https://me.sap.com/notes/2363365 however I m not able to find all the options described in the note. For example the BTP integration suite is not maintained as Business System not the SAP Commerce as thats a trail.

Is there any option to configure DFR and send DEBMAS data from S/4hana to BTP Integration Suite (former SCPI).

entry.title: Export jobs to ACDOCP from profitability & Opex are duplicating the values inFP&A
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are using FP&A content and customized according to the customer needs. After planning we are exporting the plan data to ACDOCP from FI_IFP_IM_Profitability and FI_IFP_IM_OPEX models. When we load the OPEX load, we have observed that the measure values are getting offsetted and becomes zero. Opex load is causing this issue. Is there anything we are missing related to WBS Element and cost center.

Thanks

Sridhar

entry.title: Re: SAC- Is there any way to highlight negative values ​​...

entry.title: Re: Quality inspection result recording failing in SAP Di...
entry.content: Yes @matjazmoser I also came across this issue that you listed in the post but I have already resolved that issue. The issue mentioned in my current question is a separate one.

entry.title: Re: Leverage Data Export Service to View Currency Table Data
entry.content:
Suppose a planning user wants to see exact valid FX rate for his planned period (e.g. march 2026).
Is it even possible to transform all records based on the 'valid-from' field of currency table into a Date dimension (on month level), so it can be used in such reporting?
Or to retrieve the FX rate based on version 'category' (Planning, Budget, etc.) & lookup the applicable rate
I'm not so sure this is achievable in an accurate way.

entry.title: Re: Quality inspection result recording failing in SAP Di...
entry.content: Hi @ManoelCosta. No I'm running Prod Orders in WC PODs itself only. I'm able to use the plugin and the feature in WC POD as well with limited functionality. It works for other materials which has same configs as of the MAT which gives the error mentioned in this post. Here it's asking for "additional user fields" which it doesn't ask in the other MATs inspection result recording - which is also being processed in WC POD using same plugin.

entry.title: Post goods receipt for inbound delivery using ABSL
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am nearing the end of a development and hit quite a big obstacle that I havent been able to find a solution myself.

I want to automate the creation of inbound delivery, more precisely, I have a custodian goods return. 

I have 2 big problems that I cant find. 

First problem is how to use ABSL to set the Consigmnment stock flag ? This one is probably easy but I havent found the way to set it unforunately, no matter where I looked I can not find how to set this flag when creating an inbound delivery notification.

 

Second and probably the bigger problem Im facing is that I can not find a way to automate the quantity input and the target logistics are ID - those are the 2 things that the user inputs, other stays the same

 

Is there anyone whos faced similar problems and knows how to acomplish that behavior in the system ? Its imposibly hard to find where exacly and what happens in the system once the user selects a inbound delivery notification and pressess the button post goods receipt.

 

Please help, this one has completely destroyed my mental sanity...

Thank you

 

 

I was thinking of using the SiteLogisticsLot to edit the output material quantities and area, but only the

entry.title: Hi, I am unable to capture combo box and drop down using SAP BPA desktop studio for SAP fiori APP.
entry.content:
Hi, when I was trying to do UI automation of SAP Fiori application using SAP business process automation desktop studio, I am facing the issue mentioned in the subject.

It is not capturing the required fields and objects.

Can you guide me how can I do it.

@Chaitanya_Priya @peterengel @BorisAndree

entry.title: Re: S/4 Public Cloud solution - VERTEX Implementation - B...
entry.content:
@romain0511

Thank you for your question. The issue here is that you have tax-relevant postings in your production system. This is why you can't change the tax procedure yourself, because if you were to change the tax procedure, you could generate potentially serious data inconsistencies.

 

If you want to proceed and change your tax procedure, you'll need to open an expert configuration request with SAP.

entry.title: Re: SAC- Is there any way to highlight negative values ​​...
entry.content:
Hi Vijay,

thank you for your reply.
Unfortunately, in the table in our story, the Threshold option is not accessible see screenshots.
...Thresholds are not supported yet for the new model type (model with an account dimension)...

Story is classic story.

Model Information:
Model Type: Analytic

Model Layout: Measure


System information of us tenant:

Versions
2024.8.18 (Client)
2024.8.16 (Server)

Build Dates
Wed Jul 03 2024 17:08:37+0000 (Client)
Wed Jun 19 2024 18:50:28+0200 (Server)

Where can the problem be? Any idea?

Thanks and regards

Jan

Hi,

The log txt you uploaded is about the version, which you added like so, correct?

entry.title: Code, Create, Celebrate - Go Digital Night on August 2nd
entry.content:
Hello Women in Tech Community,

We have exciting news! After a long hiatus, Go Digital Night is making a grand return. Join us on August 2nd from 4:00 PM to 7:30 PM in the WDF20 cafeteria for an evening of coding, creating, and celebrating.

This event is a fantastic opportunity also for Women in Tech to come together, network, and have fun.

During the event, international scientists, educators, and SAP employees will lead workshops on various topics, from programming a microcontroller to understanding artificial intelligence. There will also be creative activities like using a sewing machine or working with yarn to bring your ideas to life. There's something for everyone!

Programmers and tech enthusiasts aged 12 and up are welcome. To join, please register at SAP Go Digital Night 2024.

If possible, please bring a laptop or tablet to the event.

Looking forward to seeing you there!

entry.title: Re: Supplier Quotation
entry.content:
Hi,

This is the behavior in both S/4HANA on-premises and also in S/4HANA public cloud. We acknowledge this request. We will review this and share our plan via Roadmap Explorer.

entry.title: Fiori Elements - adjust the height required to use FixFlex or ScrollContainer etc.
entry.content:
In my Fiori Elements application, I'm using an Object Page which solely features a custom section defined as a fragment. Within this fragment, I'm attempting to utilize the FixFlex control. However, I find that I must specify the 'minFlexSize' to '1050' with Fiori Elements. Notably, this isn't a requirement when I use UI5.
I believe this discrepancy might be related to the parent views and elements not being set to a height of 100%. The issue also extends to the ScrollContainer, which only functions correctly when I set a fixed size, as opposed to a height of 100%.
Hence, I'm looking for a way to adjust the height for a custom section or its parent view in Fiori Elements. How might I accomplish this? Or maybe an other solution?

entry.title: Re: Interested in SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi @CarmoF ,

Welcome aboard and sorry for the delay! Invite sent.

Here is your first stop:

Exploring SAP SuccessFactors Solutions

From this learning journey, you should pick the module that sounds most interesting to you then pop it into the search to get the learning journey and certification path for it.

Regards,

David

entry.title: SAP BTP CPI - AMQP Adapter
entry.content: How to use AMQP adapter in between an iFlow . I need to read messages from queue every 15 minutes ,so have a timer which is scheduled to run every 15 minutes . But I am not able to read messages from queue in between an iFlow using OOTB components

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP CPI - AMQP Adapter
entry.content: I believe you would want to make use of webhooks to enable management of incoming events to your queue(s).

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to access default values / user parame...
entry.content: Then we're back to freestyle code... I would like to know if there is a way to use them in Fiori Elements without further coding.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4 Hana public cloud licenses.
entry.content:
Hello!

I would like to know how did you manage to solve the memory overconsumption?

entry.title: Can I dynamically switch between Screen Personas based on actions taken on-screen?
entry.content:
Is it possible for users to be shown a different Screen Persona based on manual inputs?

For example, if a user uses QM01 to to create a quality notification and they enter "Z3" for notification type, they'd be shown the Z3 persona. If they entered "Z2" for notification type, they'd see the Z2 persona. 

I appreciate the help, and am open to a different approach if a more appropriate one is available!

SAP Screen Personas

entry.title: Modify Sales Pricing Schema
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
I am in BPC (Business Process Configuration) session into S/4 Public Cloud and I am wandering if it is possible to change the proposal standard pricing schema (Y23101) or if it needs to create a copy of and then can change the procedure.

I created four new price conditions but I am not able to put them into (Y23101), only if I copy it probably I can.

Please let me know how to approach configuration.

Many thanks

S

entry.title: S/4 ABAP CDS VIEW / WDA - Select option doesn't display the selected elements - IMPR
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently creating a report in IM for the Fiori frontend as a Web Dynpro application. My source is a self-developed data model based on ACDOCA with the additional information from IMPR, IMTP & IMZO.

The aim of the report is to be able to select an investment program and an approval year and then select the selection program positions that exist in the investment program. The selected actual postings are then displayed in the report.

The report and the selection of the approval year and the investment program work as expected.

My IMPR Masterdata:

 

define view ZI_IMPR_MD as select  from impr as _impr
association [0..*] to ZB_IMPR_TEXT  as _Text on $projection.posnr = _Text.Posnr and $projection.IM_GJAHR = _Text.Gjahr
association [0..*] to ZI_IMPR_HI  as _Hier on $projection.posnr = _Hier.HierarchyNode and $projection.IM_GJAHR = _Hier.IM_GNJHR
association [0..1] to ZB_IMGJAHR as _GJAHR on $projection.IM_GJAHR = _GJAHR.gjahr
{
    @Search.defaultSearchElement: true
    @Search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.8
    @ObjectModel.hierarchy.association: '_Hier'
    @ObjectModel.text.element:  [ 'Hier_Text' ] 
    key _impr.posnr,
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_GJAHR'
    key _impr.gjahr as IM_GJAHR,
    
    _impr.posid as IM_POSID,
    _impr.parnr as IM_PARNR,
    _impr.vernr as IM_VERNR,
    _impr.objnr as IM_OBJNR,
    
    _Text.Post1 as     Hier_Text,
 
   
//Make association public   
    _Text,
    _Hier,
    _GJAHR
}

 

IMPR Hierarchy:

 

@ObjectModel: { dataCategory: #HIERARCHY }
@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZIIMPRHI'
@Hierarchy.parentChild.name: 'IMPR_01'
@Hierarchy.parentChild.label: 'IM IMPR Hierarchy 01'
@Hierarchy.parentChild: 
{ recurse:          {   parent: 'ParentNode',   child:  'HierarchyNode'   },
  siblingsOrder:    {   by: 'HierarchyNode',    direction: 'ASC'   },
  directory:        '_Hierarchy',
  orphanedNode.handling: #IGNORE }
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED 
define view ZI_IMPR_HI as select from impr
association [0..1] to ZI_IMPR_MD as _IMPR on $projection.HierarchyNode = _IMPR.posnr and $projection.IM_GNJHR = _IMPR.IM_GJAHR 
association [1..1] to ZB_IMTP_MD as _Hierarchy  on  $projection.POSNRHierarchy = _Hierarchy.Prnam and $projection.IM_GNJHR = _Hierarchy.Gjahr
association [0..1] to ZB_IMGJAHR as _GJAHR on $projection.IM_GNJHR = _GJAHR.gjahr
{
    @Consumption.filter: {mandatory : true, selectionType : #SINGLE, multipleSelections : false }
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_Hierarchy'
    key prnam  as POSNRHierarchy,   
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_IMPR'
    key posnr as HierarchyNode,
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_GJAHR'
    gjahr as IM_GNJHR,
    
    posid as IM_POSID,
    parnr as ParentNode,
    prnam as IM_PRNAM,

//Make association public 
   _IMPR,
   _Hierarchy,
   _GJAHR

 

Hierarchy directory IMTP

 

@ObjectModel.representativeKey: 'Prnam'
@EndUserText.label: 'Basic View for IMTP'
define view ZB_IMTP_MD as select from imtp
association [0..1] to ZB_IMTP_TEXT as _Text on $projection.Prnam = _Text.Prnam and $projection.Gjahr = _Text.Gjahr 
association [0..1] to ZB_IMGJAHR as _GJAHR on $projection.Gjahr = _GJAHR.gjahr
{
    @Search.defaultSearchElement: true
    @Search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.8
    @ObjectModel.text.association: '_Text'
    key prnam as Prnam,
    @ObjectModel.foreignKey.association: '_GJAHR'
    key gjahr as Gjahr,

//Make association public     
    _Text,
    _GJAHR
}

 

I join my hierarchy view with my data flow:

 

association[0..*] to ZI_IMPR_MD as _POSNR on $projection.Posnr = _POSNR.posnr and $projection.Gjahr = _POSNR.IM_GJAHR

 

..and then create my selection option in the Consumtion View: 

 

@AnalyticsDetails.query.variableSequence: 5
@Consumption.filter: {  selectionType: #HIERARCHY_NODE, multipleSelections: true, mandatory: false,
                        hierarchyBinding : [  { type: #PARAMETER, value: 'p_invprog', variableSequence: 45 },   
                                              { type: #PARAMETER, value: 'p_gjahr', variableSequence: 45 } ] }                                             
@AnalyticsDetails.query.displayHierarchy: #FILTER
@AnalyticsDetails.query.axis: #ROWS
@AnalyticsDetails.query.display: #KEY_TEXT
@AnalyticsDetails.query.totals: #SHOW
    Posnr,

 

 

As you can see, the hierarchy is displayed in the report:

The hierarchy node parameter also shows the values in a hierarchy:

If I now select a node and then press "Start" to run the report, I get no values.

Although there are definitely values without the selection.
Does anyone know why no values are displayed when a node is selected?

entry.title: Re: HANA Studio on OSX - BW Modeling Issue
entry.content:
Hi Thomas,

I am now on BW Modelling Workbench 1.25.58 and am experiencing the same issues during transformation editing as all of you did.

I am wondering why this should have been solved with an SP for 1.24.43 and now it is bad again...

Have you already tried to update to 1.25.58?

Thanks and regards

Thilo

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA Business User details
entry.content:
Hello, 
Yes, SAP S/4HANA Cloud offers an Application Programming Interface (API) for managing user data that includes business user details. The API or SDK for this purpose is Business Partner API (API_BUSINESS_PARTNER).

Consider this example to get your request (using OData service) and uses GET operations.

This is an example using the OData service:

```http
GET /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER
/A_BusinessPartner
```

If you work with Python, here is a sample code to access the API:

```python
import requests
from requests.auth import HTTPBasicAuth

url = "https://<your_S4_host>/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/A_BusinessPartner"

# Remember to replace "user" and "password" with your actual SAP S4 HANA credentials below
response = requests.get(url, auth=HTTPBasicAuth('user', 'password'))

business_users = response.json()

# iterate through the business users
for user in business_users['d']['results']:
print(f"Business User ID: {user['BusinessPartner']}, Name: {user['BusinessPartnerFullName']}")
```

Note: you will need to replace `<your_S4_host>` with your actual SAP S/4HANA instance URL.

This is only a basic API usage. There are many more fields available, depending on the level of detail you require. You will need the right permissions to get access to this data. Here is a detailed documentation on this API: https://api.sap.com/api/API_BUSINESS_PARTNER/resource

It's also important to note that the above code does not implement any error checking, which would be necessary for production code. You should check HTTP status codes and possibly handle exceptions, depending on your specific requirements.

I hope this helps, 


Best Regards,

Harish Mangtani

entry.title: Re: Help Needed Enabling Data Builder in SAP Data Sphere
entry.content:
Hello Priyanka,

Ensure your user has the required roles and authorizations assigned. Refer to Getting Started with SAP Datasphere | SAP Help Portal. The DW Modeler role is required. 

Regards
Mark

entry.title: Re: Data Slice Concept Can be used– BPC 11 Embedded & BW4HANA
entry.content:
Hey Arup,

Thank you for the guide, I'm about to implement the same concept and was wondering, if you or anyone could answer some of my questions.

My implementation will be based on version and quarter, so I would have to adjust those instead of fiscal year and account. So mine would be 0VERSION and 0CALQUARTER (YEAR/QUARTER), which will come from a variable as your code.

So the implementation would be

{ ZLOCK, VERSION, QUARTER } = 1 (for locking)

1. I was wondering why you have K4 in the FOX code? Since it is hardcoded, would the lock only apply for K4 of a chosen year for that account?

2. For the understanding, it would mean that any version and/or year/quarter with a value of 1 on ZLOCK would be locked for, is this correct?

3. E.g. I choose version P1 and 2023.Q4, would the lock apply only for this combination or would it apply for every version called P1 regradless of year/quarter?

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Services - Offline Stores
entry.content:
@Jitendra_Kansal thanks for your reply and for the info sent to me, now I have better understood the services functionalities. 
In order to recap, I would ask you one more question:


Does the offline stores tab in the SAP Mobile Services cockpit contains records only if the upload is done via Android or iOS SDK? 
In our scenario we are using the SAP MDK available on the BAS (Business Application Studio).

entry.title: Re: Today is National Sugar Cookie day (...a bit of trivia)
entry.content: I loveeeeeee mint and choc, you should definitely give it one more try @StephanieMarley 🙂

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Your first service and first endpoint (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs&qu
entry.content:
Finally I found some time to play with ngrok, amazing!

C.

entry.title: Job Requisition mass upload
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We need to be able to upload Job Reqs and at least post them on our internal and external career site. We have 100+ ones and very little time to achieve this.

We were advised that we should do this manually, but I'm wondering if there is a tool already for this in SAP SF Recruitment so we can mass create and post them. We would need this in 2 languages.

Does anyone have experience with this that he / she could share with us? If there is a tool for this, is it viable or user friendly? 

Any input or shared documentation is highly appreciated.

Thank you!

Adorján

entry.title: Re: Automate csv files upload to Datasphere (dynamic file...
entry.content:
I have raised this as an improvement request please vote

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/321337

entry.title: Re: CI/CD Process Failed With Error
entry.content:
Thank you. After adding the version as follows, you can find the logs in attachment :

{
  "name": "approuter",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "dependencies": {
    "@sap/approuter": "^16"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "build": "ui5 build",
    "start": "node node_modules/@sap/approuter/approuter.js"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@ui5/cli": "^3.8.0"
  }
}

entry.title: Re: Ship.condition 02 loading grp 0003 plant MMC1 StLoc MTL not defined
entry.content:
Hello,
Not 100% sure but I would say this message arises based on following customizing activity:
"Assign Shipping Points According to Storage Location".
This content is read if you have assigned rule "Storage-location-dependent shipping point determination" in IMG activity: "Define Rule for Determination of Shipping Point".

entry.title: Re: Performance Form Stack Ranker/Team Rater - Calculated...
entry.content:
I asked support if this was an expected behavior. See response below.

When ratings are given via stack ranker, they are reflected in the form, however they are not actually saved. Therefore, the form needs to be opened and saved in order for the rating to reflect in the dashboard.

Instead of opening each employees form and clicking on save, you can do it in a mass by following the steps in this KBA: 2076641 - Mass Update Live Performance Forms using Open&Save Documents - Performance Management

entry.title: Change bank account opening date.
entry.content:
For our implementation project, we have a requirement that the field Bank Account Opening Date (VALID_FROM) should be possible to be changed.

The status for this field is locked for changes in the configuration


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change bank account opening date.
entry.content: The resolution for your issue is given in SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3402641 "3402641 - Change Opening Date Of A Bank Account."

entry.title: Re: Today is National Sugar Cookie day (...a bit of trivia)
entry.content: @Kartik_Dua okay if you say so. Idea - maybe we need to go for an ice cream social on our next NSQ meet up- coffee vs choc chip🍨cone or dish🍦Who doesn't like ice cream??

entry.title: Re: The Easy Way To Deploy Any LLM In SAP AI Core
entry.content:
Probably, but I don't know the proper process yet. Maybe you can just copy it to the "SAP Samples" repo since I don't have access to create repo there or maybe you send me the details on how to request access and I can upload it once I got the access?

Yes, part of the code is based on your blog.

entry.title: Blank spaces in custom UI5 master detail apps in a newly migrated S4HANA launchpad.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

One of our clients recently upgraded from ECC to the latest S4HANA on-premise system, and some of the sap ui5 apps now display a blank space between the title and list in a master page. This space disappears when I reload or minimize, but it reappears when I navigate from the home page.

I am getting the following depricated error messages in the console, but they are happening to all of my apps. If I need to update, how do I do it? These APIs are something SAP UI5 calls internally, not custom code.

I have already tried changing themes; this is not a theme-specific issue.

Changing the resource to a CDN link also failed. Please guide if there is some necessary steps needs to be done on custom ui5 apps and redeploy.

 

Thanks,

Aravind

entry.title: Download software before the end of maintenance
entry.content:
Hi,

We ended the maintenance of our SAP products at the end of 2023. But today we need to download software related to them, released prior to that date. We understood we were going to be entitled to still download it ( we have the permanent licenses of those products ). But it seems imposible to get a temporary access for that task. Can it be done? How is the process? did anyone faced a similar situation?

Here the statement received last year from SAP:

Customer cannot download SW in the Software Download Center which is not covered by maintenance. Block of partial terminations possible.

If software was released before the termination, the customer is entitled to get the software after maintenance end -> SAP provides temporary access to SW downloads.

entry.title: Re: Download software before the end of maintenance
entry.content: Hi, I realised it is not the right place to post it, please delete it

entry.title: Re: Leverage Data Export Service to View Currency Table Data
entry.content:
@JefB : It is possible to transform the Valid-from date using transformation during the setup of Import Job. Please find the sample below and can be loaded into a model at Month Granularity.

2) Currently is not possible to filter the Category using the Import Job Filter, but category can be filtered in the story using story filter or input control.

entry.title: Re: Help Needed Enabling Data Builder in SAP Data Sphere
entry.content: Thank you mark You are for the quick support .

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

This is a great initiative and it would be great if I can be part of the Digital Skills Initiative program.

 
I identify myself to be a good fit for this initiative on the below aspects:
  • I am a woman
  • First generation college graduate in my family. First woman to graduate in Engineering and Business administration in my family.
  • People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts
  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I am basically from India where I was working as a SAP MM Consultant. Recently I moved to Germany into a new role as SAP MDG consultant during my mid-life career and might return back to India.  Currently I'm expecting a child, which may leave a career gap due to maternity leave. I would like to use this Digital Skills initiative effectively to manage the career gap wisely.

This opportunity would be very helpful for me in learning more about SAP and getting a certification.

 
Hoping to hear from you soon. I have also turned on the private messaging option.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Marie Therese Jenifer L

entry.title: Re: Can we use AMDP in our projects?
entry.content: Interesting question. I would like to know more about this as well. In my company we barelly consider AMDP as an option...

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA Error Happening in Monitoring - Requesting help!
entry.content: @Ron_Hagan I want to pass Environment variables in a Process flow in Build Process automation how can I do that ?
